full_text:
1. **[Antibody validation]{.underline}**

 a. BCL-6_1 primary antibody - 1:200

 b. TCF1_1 - spinned 1:200 (cycle 5)

 c. IgG (powder- rehydrated) (on 555)

 i. Looks like there are other stained structures

 ii. IgG+IgD + CD20?

 iii. 1:1000

 d. CD20

 e. CD138_4

 i. 750nm

 f. HEV_1

 g. HLA-DPB1_2

 h. CD21

 i. fDC

 ii. CD20

 iii. Mesenchymal-struncture around the TLS

 i. CD206_1

 i. Does not work

 ii. Try higher dilution (1:1500)

 iii. Try centrifuging (10-20min)

 j. IgD

 i. Assess later

 k. CD68

 l. AICDA - somatic hypermutation

2. TLS-IDS tCycIF panel

 a. Slight reorganization need

3. Scanning parameters (binning 1-2)

 a. Do everything of binning of 1

 b. The exposure times should be ¼ of the ones of binning 1

4. Progress and timeline

 a. Tomorrow is cycle 3

5. HE

 a. We will interview Venla and depending on that, we will interview
 > Adela
